name: nodekit
description: Research, scaffold, evaluate, and prove a production-shaped agent application from a business brief.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a brief into a proof-carrying agent app.
interface.longDescription: NodeKit gives Codex a timed research, scaffolding, evaluation, live-provider, browser QA, and proof workflow for hackathon and founder agent applications.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use NodeKit to turn my business pain point and required sponsor tools into the smallest live-tested, deployable, proof-carrying agent application.
